string.text: Standard magazine for AK-74, caliber 5.45x39
Bakelite 30-round magazine. One of the most common magazines in the Zone. Designation: "6L20".
60-round magazine for AK-74, caliber 5.45x39

Four-row 60-round magazine for AK-74. Extremely rare in Russia due to limited production, but it is rumored that Ukraine manufactures copies for the SBU to simplify control over the Zone. Designation: "6L31".
Standard magazine for AK-74M, caliber 5.45x39
30-round polymer magazine for AK-74, issued with the AK-74M. One of the most common magazines in the Zone. Designation: "6L23".
AK-74M magazine with quick loading system, caliber 5.45x39

Modern AK-style magazine in PMAG design with 30-round capacity. High build quality and effortless loading. These magazines are typically only found in special forces units alongside advanced AK "Alpha" rifles.
Standard magazine for RPK-74, caliber 5.45x39
45-round bakelite magazine supplied with the RPK-74. Can also be used in Kalashnikov rifles and compatible platforms.
Modified magazine for RPK-74, caliber 5.56x45
Modified magazine for RPK-74 chambered in 5.56x45. Also compatible with AK-101 and AK-102 rifles.
Standard magazine for AKM, caliber 7.62x39
Steel 30-round magazine chambered in 7.62x39. An old design, but still works fairly well.
Standard magazine for AK-103, caliber 7.62x39
30-round magazine for AK-103 assault rifle. Modern materials and design make it significantly lighter than its steel counterparts.
AK-103 magazine with quick loading system, caliber 7.62x39
PMAG-style polymer magazine for 7.62x39. Its design and build quality allow for rapid reloading. Rare to find in the Zone.
Standard drum for RPD, caliber 7.62x39

Drum belt-fed magazine for the RPD. The box holds 100 linked rounds. Although the RPD was eventually replaced by the more accurate and versatile RPK, the ability to fire 100 rounds remains respectable.
Standard magazine for RPK, caliber 7.62x39
Steel 40-round magazine for the RPK. Also compatible with AKM and other 7.62x39 AK-type rifles.
95-round drum for RPK
95-round drum for the RPK.
Standard magazine for Galil ACE-21, caliber 5.56x45
Factory Galil ACE-21 magazine with 35-round capacity. An outdated model found in the Zone that requires proprietary Galil magazines, making this weapon more of a rare novelty than anything else.
Standard magazine for AK-101, caliber 5.56x45
30-round magazine for AK-101 and AK-102.
Standard magazine for AUG, caliber 5.56x45
Factory 30-round magazine for first-generation AUG rifles. Later models are compatible with the standard STANAG pattern.
Standard magazine for G36, caliber 5.56x45
Standard translucent 30-round magazine for the G36 chambered in 5.56x45.
Standard STANAG magazine, caliber 5.56x45
30-round HK STANAG magazine. Used by various NATO rifles. Rumor has it that Freedom receives illegal NATO arms shipments, which explains the abundance of these magazines in the Zone.
Modified STANAG magazine, caliber 5.45x39
Modified STANAG magazine chambered in 5.45x39. One can only guess why someone would go through the trouble of converting a rifle this way.
STANAG magazine with quick loading system, caliber 5.56x45
Modern PMAG 30-round magazine. Much lighter than its steel counterpart, with an ergonomic design that allows for fast reloading.
Extended STANAG magazine, caliber 5.56x45
Extended 40-round polymer magazine compatible with most NATO rifles.
60-round STANAG magazine, caliber 5.56x45
60-round quad-stack magazine compatible with most NATO rifles. Offers high firepower, but it's extremely heavy and its structure makes reloading difficult.
Standard magazine for SG550, caliber 5.56x45
Swiss-made 30-round magazine. Compatible with SIG SG550, SG552, and SG550-1 "Sniper".
20-round magazine for SG550-1, caliber 5.56x45
20-round magazine for the SG550-1 "Sniper", also compatible with other rifles in the same family.
Ammo box for M249, caliber 5.56x45
100-round belt-fed box. Used by Freedom forces at checkpoints and outposts to provide heavy suppressive fire.
Standard magazine for XM8, caliber 5.56x45
Standard magazine for the XM8 rifle, caliber 5.56x45.
Standard magazine for Type 63, caliber 7.62x39
20-round magazine for the Type 63 rifle.
Modified Type 63 magazine, caliber 7.62x54
Magazine for the Type 63 modified to fit larger 7.62x54R cartridges. The Type 63 is a favorite among bandit clans; reconfigured to fire full-sized rifle rounds.
20-round magazine for AS "Val", caliber 9x39
Standard 20-round magazine for the AS "Val". Also compatible with SR-3M "Vikhr" and VSS "Vintorez" rifles. Designation: "6L25".
30-round magazine for SR-3M "Vikhr", caliber 9x39
30-round 9x39mm magazine. Supplied with the SR-3M "Vikhr" rifle. Also compatible with the VSS "Vintorez" and AS "Val". Designation: "SR3M.130".
10-round magazine for VSS "Vintorez", caliber 9x39
Standard 10-round magazine for the VSS "Vintorez". Also compatible with the AS "Val" and SR-3M "Vikhr". Designation: "6L24".
Standard 9x39 magazine for compatible rifles
20-round magazine for the 9A-91 and VSK-94 rifles.
20-round magazine for OTs-14 "Groza", caliber 9x39
20-round magazine supplied with the OTs-14 "Groza". Its design resembles that of AK-series magazines.
Standard magazine for G43, caliber 7.92x57
Standard box magazine for the G43.
Standard magazine for Galil, caliber 7.62x51
Standard 20-round box magazine for the Israeli battle rifle Galil.
Standard STANAG magazine, caliber 7.62x51
Standard STANAG magazine for 7.62x51 NATO cartridges. Used in HK417, SCAR, and SR-25. Holds 20 rounds.
Extended STANAG magazine, caliber 7.62x51
Extended STANAG magazine for 7.62x51 NATO rounds. Used in HK417, SCAR, and SR-25. Holds 30 rounds.
STANAG magazine with quick loading system, caliber 7.62x51
Upgraded PMAG magazine for 7.62x51 rounds. Used in HK417, SCAR, and SR-25. Holds 20 rounds.
10-round STANAG magazine, caliber 7.62x51
Compact 10-round STANAG magazine for 7.62x51. Comes standard with the KAC SR-25 but also usable in the HK417 and SCAR Mk.17.
Standard magazine for 7.62x51
Standard 20-round magazine for 7.62x51 used in battle rifles. Compatible with FN FAL, Mk.14 EBR, and G3.
Extended magazine for 7.62x51
Extended 30-round magazine for 7.62x51 used in battle rifles. Compatible with FN FAL, Mk.14 EBR, and G3.
10-round magazine for L96A1, caliber 7.62x51
Standard magazine for the L96A1. The L96 is a favorite among western mercenaries and Monolith forces.
Standard magazine for Remington 700, caliber 7.62x51
Standard 5-round magazine for the Remington 700. A popular hunting rifle that performs well in the Zone.
Standard magazine for Walther WA 2000, caliber 7.62x51
Standard magazine for the Walther WA 2000, caliber 7.62x51.
100-round belt box for PKM, caliber 7.62x54
Heavy box holding 100 rounds of 7.62x54R on a belt, used with the PKM. Recommended to bring several if you're planning on hunting pseudogiants or chimeras.
Modified 10-round magazine for L96A1, caliber 7.62x54
Modified 10-round magazine for the L96A1, chambered in 7.62x54.
Standard magazine for SV-98, caliber 7.62x54
Standard 10-round polymer magazine for the SV-98 sniper rifle. The SV-98 is mostly used by Russian law enforcement; a limited number of rifles reached Duty through secret channels.
Standard magazine for SVD, caliber 7.62x54
Standard 10-round magazine for the SVD and SVU. A popular and rare rifle for those who can afford it...
20-round magazine for SVD, caliber 7.62x54
Extended 20-round magazine for SVD and SVU sniper rifles. Often used in the SVU-A as a temporary replacement for a light machine gun in close-range skirmishes.
Standard magazine for SVT-40, caliber 7.62x54
Standard 10-round magazine for the SVT-40. A classic from the Great War era, popular among many stalkers—especially rookie loners.
Standard magazine for SVT-40, caliber 7.62x54
Standard 10-round magazine for the SVT-40. A classic from the Great War era, popular among rookie stalkers. This version has been slightly modified to handle heavy machine gun 7.62x54 rounds.
Modified magazine for SVT-40, caliber 7.62x39
Modified magazine for the SVT-40 to accept intermediate 7.62x39 ammunition.
Standard magazine for .338 Lapua Magnum
5-round magazine for the Sako TRG-42, L96 AWM, and M24 SWS. Originally developed for the SAKO, this magazine was later slightly modified to be compatible with other rifles.
10-round magazine for L96A1, caliber .338 LM
Standard 10-round magazine for the L96A1, designed for the larger and significantly more powerful .338 Lapua Magnum. The L96 is a favorite among western mercs and Monolith forces.
Standard magazine for M98B, caliber .338 LM
10-round magazine for the Barrett M98B.
Standard magazine for VSSK "Vykhlop", caliber 12.7x55
Standard magazine for the large-caliber sniper rifle VSSK "Vykhlop".
Standard magazine for ASh-12, caliber 12.7x55
Standard 10-round magazine for the ASh-12. It’s unlikely you’ll ever need more than 10 rounds to deal with humans.
Extended magazine for ASh-12, caliber 12.7x55
Extended 20-round magazine for the ASh-12. For when you need to take down giant mutants...
10-round magazine for M82, caliber 12.7x55

10-round magazine for the large-caliber Barrett M82, modified for 12.7x55 STs rounds. The first stalker to bring such a monster of a weapon threw it away after running out of ammo. Resourceful technicians modified it to use more common ammunition without replacing the very heavy barrel.
Standard magazine for Saiga-12S, caliber 12x70
Standard 8-round magazine for the Saiga-12S shotgun. The Saiga is a quality shotgun, popular among Duty members.
Extended magazine for Saiga-12S, caliber 12x70
Extended 12-round magazine for the Saiga-12S shotgun. More shells means more dead mutants.
Standard magazine for USAS-12, caliber 12x70
20-round magazine for the USAS-12 automatic shotgun. The USAS-12 offers unmatched firepower at close range, although the magazine's size and weight make it impractical for a stalker's pockets.
Extended magazine for USAS-12, caliber 12x70
Extended 30-round drum magazine for the USAS-12 automatic shotgun. Unrivaled in close-quarters firepower, though the size and weight of the magazine make it impractical to carry around.
Standard magazine for Vepr-12, caliber 12x70
Standard 10-round magazine for the Vepr-12. Despite similarities, Vepr-12 magazines are not compatible with the Saiga-12S.
Compact magazine for Vepr-12, caliber 12x70
Small 5-round magazine for the Vepr-12. Easily fits into pockets and is quick to reload.
